title: How to Use NanoClaw (Better Than OpenClaw?)
summary: NanoClaw is a lightweight, AI-native alternative to OpenClaw designed to be customized by Claude Code without complex codebases. It uses ephemeral Docker containers for safety, supports agent swarms coordinated through Telegram, and is built to be forked and rewritten by AI systems.
